---
title: 'His Love Story'
date: '2013-07-18T16:34:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5733795566404736245'
blogger_filename: '/2013/07/his-love-story_18.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<span style="font-family: Calibri;"></span><br /><br /><div class="MsoHeader" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">The Love Story – Study originally from The <a href="http://www.gototherock.com/#!anaheim/c173e" target="_blank">Rock Church, Anaheim CA </a></span></div><div class="MsoHeader" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Adapted by Darrell G. Wolfe</span></div><div class="WordSection1"><h1 align="center" style="margin: 24pt 0in 0pt; text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: large;"><span style="color: #365f91;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">Love Story<o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h1><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">Pattern Breaks in Hebrew writing. <o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">1 Chronicles 4:9 Jabez<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Genesis 1 <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 1in; mso-add-space: auto; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: 'Courier New'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Courier New';"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">o<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">“God said: Let The/There…”<span style="mso-spacerun: yes;">&nbsp; </span>V<span style="mso-spacerun: yes;">&nbsp; </span>“God said: Let US…”<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 1in; mso-add-space: auto; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: 'Courier New'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Courier New';"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">o<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">God gets personally involved in the creation of man. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 1in; mso-add-space: auto; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: 'Courier New'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Courier New';"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">o<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">John 1 and Proverbs 8:30 show us it was Jesus that created the world and He was intimately involved. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 1in; mso-add-space: auto; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: 'Courier New'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Courier New';"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">o<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Genesis 1 shows us Jesus interrupting the whole process<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt 1.5in; mso-add-space: auto; mso-list: l2 level3 lfo1; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Wingdings; mso-bidi-font-family: Wingdings; mso-fareast-font-family: Wingdings;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">§<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">It’s as though Jesus says… “Wait! Let’s do this differently. Let us… Let us make man… IN OUR image! Let’s make him just like us!”<o:p></o:p></span></div><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">Despite the fall of man Jesus never changes his position toward us! <o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Genesis 3: 15,21 God promises a SEED and provides a COVERING!<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Genesis 3:22-24 God drives man away from the tree of life, why? To punish him? No! The tree of life would perpetuate man’s life forever, as long as he ate it he would be wholly restored. Eating of the tree of life would lock mankind into this fallen and twisted nature forever! <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt 0.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Genesis 6 shows that Man’s lifespan sharply decreases as the earth is changed by the flood. This is again because when man has 100’s and 100’s of years to live his evil is nearly uncapped. By stunting lifespan evil is capped and mankind has reprieves from evil tyrants, from Nimrod the Hunter to Alexander the Great to Hitler evil men rise and fall, their evil is capped.<o:p></o:p></span></div><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">God is a TOOKER!<o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 38.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo3; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Genesis 5:21-27 we see what happens when ONE man follows God with his whole heart and not just religiously. God was looking for a friend. He walked with Adam in the garden and wanted a friend among men again. He found a clean heart and passionate response in the man Enoch. Enoch was so passionate about God he was called in the book of Jude a prophet. So he had a ministry here on earth to prepare men for salvation and/or judgment. His great grandson and great great grand sons become the last living humans on earth. Everyone alive today, including Jesus, was a descendant of Enoch the Prophet! <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt 38.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo3; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">God loved him so much, enjoyed his presence so much, he just up and took him! This was one of only two men in human history that have been taken to God’s side prior to experiencing death, the only others will be those who go in the final rapture of the Church! <o:p></o:p></span></div><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">God is reaching<o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">You see God Reaching out over and over to establish relationship with men, individually, not just collectively. It’s not just mankind he is interested in, for that he can operate through corporate bodies, he is interested in MAN not just men. Job and Abraham were contemporaries and he reached out to both. One taught and trained his kids and one didn’t. Abraham, because he taught his kids, inherited the BLESSING! <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">We then see him reaching to Moses, Joshua, David, and others. Over and over he reaches nations and men. He’s so interested in our living well and protected from the curse he takes time to explain the difference to our dulled minds in Deut 28 and then even summarizes it by asking us to choose life in Deut 30:19. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He reminds us over and over of who He is, and who He wants us to be to Him. He is our romantic lover in Songs of Solomon. He is our kinsman redeemer in Ruth. He is asking us to return to him when we abandoned Him, Jeremiah 3:14. <o:p></o:p></span></div><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">I’m Coming! <o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He is calling to us reminding us He is the SEED and He is STILL COMING! Zechariah 6:12-13! <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He reminds us again just before the curtain closes on the first half of the play, in Malachi 4:2-6<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Then comes intermission. And for several hundred years He is silent. <o:p></o:p></span></div><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">He Came!<o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">John 1 and John 10 tells us how the creator become one of His own creations and walked among us, gave His life, and rose again. He conquered death and gave us life, and life more abundantly! <o:p></o:p></span></div><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">He’s Coming Again! <o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Acts 1, the angels promise His return in the clouds as He went, so He comes again.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">John 14: 1-2 “I’ll GO, Prepare, Return”<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">1 Thess 4:16-17 The Lord Himself will descend…<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">Revelations 22 In the last book of the bible, the last Word He left us in writing titled “The Revelation of Jesus The Anointed One and His Anointing” He says THREE TIMES “I’m Coming!”<o:p></o:p></span></div><h2 style="margin: 10pt 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="color: #4f81bd;"><span style="font-family: Cambria;">Conclusion<o:p></o:p></span></span></span></h2><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt;"><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He is PASSIONATELY involved in our lives! He loves us intimately! Therefore what conclusions can we draw about this fact that affect us in our lives today?<o:p></o:p></span></div></div><span style="font-family: 'Calibri','sans-serif'; font-size: 11pt; line-height: 115%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-break-type: section-break; page-break-before: auto;" /></span><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo4; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He cares<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo4; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He heals<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo4; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He sets free<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo4; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He provides<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt 0.5in; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo4; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He guides<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin: 0in 0in 10pt 0.5in; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo4; text-indent: -0.25in;"><span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol;"><span style="mso-list: Ignore;">·<span style="font: 7pt 'Times New Roman';">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></span><span style="font-family: Calibri;">He…</span><br /><br /><br /><span style="font-family: Calibri;"><br /><b>Have questions about anything I said here? Want to share your story? Comment Below!</b><br /><b><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b><br /><b><br /></b><b>N2 Good Success</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br />Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</a><br />Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess?sk=wall" target="_blank">https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br />Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a><br />Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />___<br /><o:p></o:p></span></div>
